_comment: Figma MCP server. Requires a Figma Personal Access Token with File content (Read) and Dev resources (Read/Write) scopes. Used by UX Designer for design-to-code workflows. Remote server — no local install needed.
_setup: 1. Figma → Account Settings → Personal Access Tokens → Generate new token. 2. Set FIGMA_API_KEY env var or paste token in the config below.
